utility_evaluation.REASONING:

4. accommodation → includes name, type, rating, meal plan, price per night, total, currency, nights ✅ fully specified with cost.

7. total_budget → full breakdown, total price, currency ✅ fully specified.
Therefore, 5 out of 7 items are successfully included and fully specified.
